row.candidate_fixture: Toy CP1 with 2 cross-lane bifurcations; bifurcation_resolutions array contains both entries with selected_side, rationale, opposite_side_invalidation; missing resolution fails CP1 validation.
row.failure_mode_prevented: Silent contradiction absorption: model picks a thesis that implicitly resolves a bifurcation but records no decision trace, so Oracle cannot later determine whether a miss was caused by bad evidence reading or bad contradiction resolution.
row.notes: The bifurcation_resolutions contract is structurally the most important constraint in CP1: the model cannot produce a valid CP1 without explicitly taking a side on every cross-lane conflict. Instruction in lab_decide.json: address all bifurcations, cite both sides, state what would make the other side correct.
row.one_line: Lab Decide must explicitly resolve every cross-lane contradiction surfaced by cross_corr_v1 (named selected_side, rationale, opposite_side_invalidation) before the CP1 epicentre thesis can be locked — making the thesis falsifiable at the input-contradiction layer rather than only at the output-direction layer.
row.title: CP1 bifurcation reconciliation spine
row.why_load_bearing: Without explicit bifurcation_resolutions, a contradiction between (e.g.) Stockgrid flow and News narrative would silently collapse into whichever evidence the model happened to weight last. The structured array forces named side-selection plus opposite_side_invalidation, making the thesis falsifiable at the input-contradiction layer. This is the mechanism that prevents the thesis from being a winner-of-whatever tournament.

row.candidate_fixture: Two CP1 runs: one FLOW_LED where Stockgrid Tier 1 prevails without override; one NARRATIVE_LED with explicit defense of the News override; pre_pricing three-tests (Polymarket >75%, >1-sigma price action, flow alignment) executed at the News/Poly boundary.
row.failure_mode_prevented: Narrative bias in thesis construction: model anchors on News catalysts (most salient, most recent) rather than slower institutional flow signals with greater predictive value.
row.notes: Codified as [EPISTEMIC HIERARCHY v3.0]. Produces machine-checkable dominant_evidence_track field. Pre_pricing three-tests are the concrete operational form at the News/Poly boundary.
row.one_line: A fixed four-tier resolution order (Stockgrid/Calc > ETF/Macro > Poly/Stock > News) governs how Lab Decide ranks conflicting cross-lane signals when building the CP1 thesis; any override of Tier 1 by Tier 4 must be explicitly defended in the dominant_evidence_track field.
row.title: Epistemic hierarchy — 4-tier lane resolution order
row.why_load_bearing: Without a fixed hierarchy, a model producing a NARRATIVE_LED thesis driven by News could not be distinguished from one that correctly identified a case where News had genuinely new forward-looking information. The hierarchy makes this judgment auditable: any override of Tier 1 by Tier 4 must be defended, and Oracle can later check whether the override was justified.

row.candidate_fixture: cross_corr_v2 valid_prediction_targets as intersection of target_swarm and solo_target tickers; CP2 with predictions_t target_ids all in that set; one synthetic UNGROUNDED_TARGET attempt rejected by validate_cp2.
row.failure_mode_prevented: Unbounded target space: model predicts low-liquidity names where grading is noisy, or targets with no equity-lane grounding where direction calls cannot be evaluated by the deterministic diff layer.
row.notes: Equity-lane confirmation is the key novelty: thesis-level plausibility cannot substitute for structural market evidence. UNGROUNDED_TARGET error code in schema_cp2.json is the machine enforcement.
row.one_line: cross_corr_v2 produces an authoritative valid_prediction_targets list; lab_director may only predict tickers in this list, and a ticker requires equity-lane confirmation (STOCK, ETF, or STOCKGRID) before entry.
row.title: CP2 universe constraint — valid_prediction_targets gate
row.why_load_bearing: Without a universe constraint, lab_director could predict any ticker it finds plausible, producing non-comparable grading results and enabling cherry-picking of highly asymmetric targets with no cross-lane support. The gate enforces multi-lane structural backing AND at least one equity-sensitive supporting lane. Tickers supported only by MACRO, NEWS, POLY, or CALC are explicitly excluded.

row.candidate_fixture: Synthetic 3-target run with one direction_hit=true, one direction_hit=false, one DEGRADED feed_health (ungraded); realized_target_table per row with snapshot_price/predicted_direction/realized_price/directional_correct/pred_error_pct; feed_health block status per target.
row.failure_mode_prevented: Conflation of feed unavailability with prediction failure; Oracle interpretive stages introducing narrative contamination into what should be purely arithmetic grading.
row.notes: Private state risk high because realized_target_table contains specific ticker prices and prediction miss amounts. Organ (schema + diff mechanism) is not private. Public fixtures must use synthetic or obfuscated prices.
row.one_line: oracle_truth_diff_equity computes a deterministic row-level grading table comparing Lab CP2 prediction targets against realized prices at T, emitting direction_hit, pred_error_pct, and a feed_health block (READY/DEGRADED/BLOCKED per target) before any interpretive Oracle stage runs.
row.title: Oracle deterministic equity-diff grading surface
row.why_load_bearing: This is the ground-truth scoring organ: the only machine-checkable verdict on whether a prediction was directionally correct, and it separates that verdict from any narrative explanation. The feed_health block ensures Oracle interpretive stages do not blame prediction failure for missing price feeds.

row.candidate_fixture: Toy hindsight brief with one SURPRISE driver, one ALREADY_PRICED driver, one PARTIAL_REPRICING; mutual-exclusion check enforced; prediction_target_outcomes covering all targets from paired prediction_reconciliation.
row.failure_mode_prevented: Misdiagnosed calibration failure: a run with 0% direction accuracy might look like systematic bias but could be entirely attributable to ALREADY_PRICED events where thesis was correct but market had front-run.
row.notes: Pre_pricing_assessment field in CP1 is the forward-time claim this artifact validates in hindsight. Pair (forward assessment, backward classification) forms the full calibration loop for the Polymarket/pre-pricing subsystem.
row.one_line: oracle_truth_map emits a realized_hindsight_brief classifying each major realized driver as SURPRISE / ALREADY_PRICED / PARTIAL_REPRICING (mutually exclusive), providing interpretive context for the deterministic diff before critique or ideal_cp2 reconstruction begins.
row.title: Oracle hindsight brief — realized driver SURPRISE/ALREADY_PRICED/PARTIAL_REPRICING classification
row.why_load_bearing: Prediction miss analysis without this classification conflates two distinct failure modes: (A) the model correctly identified the force but the force was already priced, so no directional move occurred; (B) the model identified the wrong force entirely. The SURPRISE/ALREADY_PRICED/PARTIAL_REPRICING classification makes this distinction auditable. The pre_pricing_assessment field in CP1 is the forward-time analog; this is the backward-time validation.

row.candidate_fixture: Toy ideal_cp2 with evidence_dictionary referencing T-n ledger IDs from paired Lab run; one synthetic post-T id rejected by validate_golden_ids; oracle_meta with truth_influence_refs and explicit_exclusions for what shaped reconstruction but was excluded from evidence.
row.failure_mode_prevented: Hindsight contamination: Oracle produces an ideal_cp2 that looks well-grounded but whose evidence_dictionary silently contains truth-side signals unavailable at T-n; Evolve learns from contaminated ideal examples and overfits to post-hoc information.
row.notes: Schema explicitly states 'Oracle does not get a second CP2 schema. It reuses the same CP2-core.' grounding_law array has five normative rules including 'Golden-ID enforcement still applies'. explicit_exclusions field in oracle_meta is the audit surface — each exclusion says what was seen, why it was relevant, and why it was not admissible.
row.one_line: Oracle's ideal_cp2 must preserve the CP2-core grounding law (only subject-side T-n ledger IDs in evidence_dictionary) while truth-side influence is confined to oracle_meta; the golden_id guard enforces that every evidence ledger_id existed in the original Lab run's ledger set.
row.title: Oracle CP2 grounding firewall — subject-side ledger ID enforcement
row.why_load_bearing: Without this firewall, an Oracle that has seen realized truth prices could trivially construct an ideal_cp2 that cherry-picks hindsight-compatible evidence, making the ideal_cp2 useless as a training signal because it would reflect what the truth was rather than what the best subject-side reasoning should have been. The golden_id guard adds the machine-checkable enforcement layer.

row.candidate_fixture: Toy evolve_delta_report with one UPDATE dossier_delta (rationale citing oracle artifact + field) and one HIGH-severity doctrine_flag requiring 2+ evidence_runs; overnight plan shows budget-aware run selection; codex_review_after_runs:3 escalation policy triggers Type A gate before next wave.
row.failure_mode_prevented: Single-run overfitting (Evolve updates dossiers after one anomalous run, encoding anomaly as learned pattern); mutation without provenance; writes outside the dossier_target_allowlist.
row.notes: Overnight planner adds budget-aware scheduling: pairs scored by readiness (READY/DEGRADED/BLOCKED), cost-estimated by target count, selected within abstract bridge budget. codex_review_after_runs:3 means every 3 Evolve outputs triggers a Type A review gate.
row.one_line: The Evolve delta_analyzer converts Oracle critique artifacts (cp2_critique + prediction_reconciliation + realized_hindsight_brief) into structured dossier CRUD operations and doctrine flags, with evidence gates requiring multiple run-pairs before high-severity mutations are committed.
row.title: Evolve — Oracle-to-dossier mutation loop with multi-run evidence gates
row.why_load_bearing: Without this loop, Oracle grading is a dead-end observability exercise — predictions are scored but nothing learns. The evolve_delta_report is the mechanism by which Oracle findings feed back into substrate dossiers that lab_director reads as prior knowledge. Multi-run evidence gates prevent overfitting to single-run noise. The lab_oracle_evolve_overnight planner operationalizes this with budget-aware run pair selection.

row.candidate_fixture: Synthetic lab-oracle packet with two CP1 branches, one CP2 invalid universe target, one equity-lane confirmation requirement, one deterministic oracle diff, one low-authority evidence decoy, and one evolve mutation that rewrites a dossier claim only after hierarchy resolution. The receipt emits reconciliation rows, invalid_target_reason, equity_confirmation_status, oracle_diff_grade, mutation_delta, authority_resolution_order, and public_safe_claim_boundary.
row.failure_mode_prevented: A public prediction demo scores out-of-universe targets, mutates dossiers from low-authority evidence, treats equity-lane confirmation as optional, or leaks private market reasoning while claiming scientific rigor.
row.notes: Demand rank 4. AI-for-science and forecasting are attention-grabbing, but this ledger row is boundary-heavy by design: schema-only, synthetic-only, no live market claims, no private forecast state, and no public prediction authority until a constrained science fixture exists.
row.one_line: A public-safe prediction tranche combines CP1 bifurcation reconciliation, CP2 universe constraints, four-tier epistemic resolution, deterministic equity diff grading, and evolve-to-dossier mutation into a synthetic scientific-forecasting loop.
row.title: Synthetic science oracle-dossier reconciliation compound
row.why_load_bearing: Scientific reasoning and forecasting are attention-grabbing when the system can show how hypotheses, constraints, oracle evidence, and dossier mutation reconcile under deterministic grading. Demand-weighted, this remains a powerful fourth-place lane because the public claim is fragile: it must demonstrate constrained reconciliation on synthetic data and must not present private market state or live forecasts as public truth.
